case_title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO A MUNICIPAL VS GLOUZELLIS, TED IND DBA NOB HILL CHICKEN & RIBS

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,000.21 FILED BY CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO A MUNICIPAL CORPORATION, INVESTIGATION DIVISION ROOM 220 AS TO DEFENDANT GLOUZELLIS, TED IND  DBA NOB HILL CHICKEN & RIBS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-06-1994 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 07
